purpose: Revert one or more commits on an existing PR branch via `git revert`. No agent — fully mechanical.

pr.description: GitHub PR number whose branch to revert commits on.

shas.description: One or more commit SHAs (whitespace-separated) to revert. Each must exist in the PR branch's history.

success: revert completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: revert cannot return a valid canonical result
